title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 287.043 - Abrogation of case law regarding definition of owner
text:
287.043.  Abrogation of case law regarding definition of owner. — In applying the provisions of subsection 1 of section 287.020 and subsection 4 of section 287.040, it is the intent of the legislature to reject and abrogate earlier case law interpretations on the meaning of or definition of "owner", as extended in the following cases: Owner Operator Independent Drivers Ass'n., Inc. v. New Prime, Inc., 133 S.W.3d 162 (Mo. App. S.D., 2004); Nunn v. C.C. Midwest, 151 S.W.3d 388 (Mo. App. W.D., 2004).
(L. 2005 S.B. 1 & 130)
